raw_consumer_statement:
Dear Consumer Financial Protection Bureau ( CFPB ), I am writing to seek urgent assistance regarding an unprofessional experience I have encountered with Citibank related to a recent travel disruption. 

Approximately one month ago, I used my Citibank credit card to purchase XXXX plane tickets through XXXX for a trip with XXXX  XXXX XXXX. The total amount charged was {$1300.00}. However, I soon noticed that this transaction was divided into XXXX separate charges : {$620.00}, {$620.00}, and {$85.00}. The tickets, which are return tickets from XXXX to XXXX ( XXXX ) with a stop in XXXX, were scheduled for XX/XX/scrub> 2024. 

Subsequently, we were informed by XXXX that the airline had canceled our flight and would issue a full refund. The airline also advised us that if we still wished to travel, we would need to rebook. We had no choice but to rebook our tickets using a different card ( XXXX XXXX ) for payment. 

Despite providing Citibank with substantial evidence supporting our situationsuch as proof of the rebooking along with bank statements reflecting the different payment methodwe have yet to receive the refund for the initial transaction. 

I have opened XXXX disputes with Citibank regarding these charges : XXXX. **Case ID XXXX for {$620.00} ( opened XXXX XXXX, 2024 ) XXXX. **Case ID XXXX for {$620.00} ( opened XX/XX/year>2024 ) XXXX. **Case ID XXXX for {$85.00} ( opened XX/XX/scrub> 2024 ) While I have complied with all requests for documentation, Citibank recently closed Case ID XXXX in the merchant 's favor, despite the clear evidence we provided. In regards to the other XXXX disputes, I received communication stating that they still require more information from me. However, it's Been 48 hours & I still don't see any notice from Citibank under the Notices & Letters and yet the already reversed the temporary credit they issue to my account. 

I am increasingly frustrated and distressed by Citibank 's lack of professionalism and inadequate handling of this matter. I am now seeking legal assistance as I feel I am not receiving a fair resolution. 

I would greatly appreciate your guidance and support in addressing this issue with Citibank. Thank you for your attention to this urgent matter. 

Sincerely, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX
